name: atlas-negative-edge-cases
description: Focused negative, malformed, and edge-case retrieval eval cases.

cases.scenario: nonsense query should stay low-confidence and expose diagnostics rather than a grounded exact match

cases.query: atlas frobnicate non-existent command unknown command troubleshooting help
cases.scenario: non-existent command queries land on CLI/runtime docs rather than fabricated command docs

cases.query: ambiguous shorthand use --host full SSH HTTPS URL non-interactive ambiguous cases
cases.scenario: ambiguous repo shorthand guidance is retrievable

cases.query: retrival contxt planing token budjet omissions diagnostics
cases.scenario: typo-heavy retrieval/context query still lands on nearby retrieval docs
exact path lookup retrieves that document
slash/dot/symbol artifact path query retrieves artifact docs

cases.query: Please explain in detail whether Atlas query-time search retrieval MCP and HTTP reads fetch remote source content upload indexed corpus content to external services store tokens in config logs diagnostics OpenAPI examples MCP output artifacts fixtures issue templates, and cite the local-first security boundary docs for credentials, public artifacts, internal visibility, machine-local paths, and least-privilege read tokens during explicit artifact fetch workflows.
cases.scenario: long compound query retrieves security boundary docs

terms: do not fetch remote source content
does not upload indexed corpus content

cases.query: budgetTokens usedTokens selected corpus evidence token cost omission diagnostics budget authority redundancy
cases.scenario: small-budget concepts retrieve budget and omission docs

cases.query: generated vendor directories .moxel .atlas node_modules dist coverage target ignored live topology build source listing
cases.scenario: generated/vendor path edge case guidance is retrievable

cases.query: multiple top-ranked hits too close choose confidently ambiguity diagnostics clarify repo package module path
cases.scenario: ambiguous query reports deterministic diagnostics and medium confidence
